memory.summary: I am currently stressed and tired, but a friend invited me to lunch. This social opportunity conflicts with my plan to finish the assignment analysis first.
My assignment analysis is halfway done, and my friends are now ordering lunch without me.
I made progress on the analysis but now realize it is due in under an hour and remains unfinished.
I made slow progress on the analysis, but with under an hour left and unfinished work, I need to focus intensely to finish before the deadline.
I worked for 15 minutes but missed the 18:00 deadline with my analysis still unfinished at 79%.
I missed the reading deadline entirely, but my analysis work is now at 88% with energy still available.
My analysis section is now 92% complete after 1.5 hours of work, bringing me very close to finishing the task before the deadline.
After working 0.5 hours, my analysis is now 94% complete, leaving only a small fraction of the task remaining.
After working another 0.5 hours, my analysis is now 95% complete, leaving only a tiny fraction of the task remaining before the deadline.
After 0.5 more hours, my analysis is 97% complete, leaving just 3% remaining before the deadline.
After working until 23:39, my analysis is now 98% complete. With only 2% left and high stress, the deadline is nearly met.
The analysis section is now 100% complete, finalizing the course assignment. With this task done, I can focus on resting despite my low energy and high stress.
